changeSet.author: Mouli24

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'PATIENT_VIEW'

changeSet.comment: Add PATIENT_VIEW role for patient photo endpoint authorization. Grants access to Results entry and Results Admin roles via the SamplePatientEntry module.

column.name: description
column.value: Allows viewing of patient photos and sensitive patient data

column.name: system_role_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results entry')

column.name: system_module_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'SamplePatientEntry' limit 1)

column.name: system_role_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results Admin')

column.name: system_module_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'SamplePatientEntry' limit 1)
